## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena.im to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and AI-driven content generation improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content strategy focuses on differentiating Arena.im as a B2B solution and emphasizing community features](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [SEO metrics show positive trends with increased clicks (+36) and impressions (nearly doubled)](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [GrowthX developed an improved AI content generation workflow (V2) with superior output quality](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Arena.im to review and publish pending draft articles to maintain content momentum](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [New article series planned to highlight Arena.im's unique features and B2B focus](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [40+ new topic suggestions added to Airtable for review](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Emphasis on community angle in upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [SEO optimization planned for key pages to reinforce unique selling points](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [77 articles currently indexed in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [36 more clicks compared to last week](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Impressions nearly doubled, indicating positive growth trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [6 articles still in draft status, to be published soon](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

### AI Content Generation Improvements

  - [GrowthX developed V2 of AI content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Enhancements include:](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Improved sourcing from top 10 competitors](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
      - [Addition of valuable external links](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
      - [Better readability and formatting (e.g., more bullet points)](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [Superior unedited output quality](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Launch planned for next week, aiming for 10 AI-generated articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Content Publication Status

  - [Mix-up between internal teams caused delay in publishing some articles](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Paola to review and publish pending drafts between today and tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [One article ("10 User Retention Strategies for E-commerce") missing featured image, to be fixed post-call](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)

### Miscellaneous Updates

  - [São Paulo conference provided insights on AI and product development (Paulo unable to attend due to COVID)](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [GrowthX refreshed articles from content-free tab, to be launched over the weekend or early next week](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Performance metrics for individual articles available in the performance tab for strategy adjustment](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Paola to review 40+ new topic suggestions in Airtable assignments tab](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [GrowthX to launch improved AI content generation workflow (V2) next week](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Arena.im team to publish pending draft articles](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance and adjust strategy based on metrics](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [GrowthX to fix missing featured image for "10 User Retention Strategies for E-commerce" article](https://fathom.video/share/3mLW3yvfUBp6r_8dVz8eqGYYsoRcSXsr?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
